g.text: M A G L K V T S A P...
S T V P Q F L N G K...
K T V A E Q L S M G...
V A E Q L S M G K T...
values: k-mer sequence → abundance values for each sample
Exploits lexicographic redundancy between adjacent k-mers
Counts vectors are assembled from unique bit-packed chunks
Searching is O(log(n)) with n being the space between two preﬁx space (virtually O(1))
